subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and daughter of My servant! With the ear of thy soul, hearken unto the call of the All-Merciful from the precincts of the Prison, and with all thy spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز من و دختر بنده من بگوش جان ندای رحمن را از شطر سجن بشنو و بتمام روان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
